metadata.notes: FAQ entries are designed from UG Admissions/AAD FAQ themes and should be validated periodically against official pages.

security_notices: Never request user passwords, OTP, or MoMo PIN in chat.
Mask student IDs and transaction references when sharing logs.
Escalate account-level requests to official UG channels.

faqs.question: How do I apply for undergraduate admission at UG?
faqs.answer: Use the official UG admissions portal, purchase/apply with the required e-voucher, complete all fields, upload required documents, and submit before the deadline.
faqs.escalation: Contact UG Admissions support if payment or form submission fails.

faqs.question: Can I edit my application after submission?
faqs.answer: Most UG admission forms can only be edited before final submission. If already submitted, contact Admissions support immediately for guidance.
faqs.escalation: Escalate to UG Admissions with your application reference number.

faqs.question: How do I check my admission status?
faqs.answer: Log in to the UG admissions checker/portal using your application details to view current status and any further instructions.
faqs.escalation: If status is unavailable after official release, contact Admissions.

faqs.question: How do I know if I am eligible to graduate?
faqs.answer: Graduation eligibility depends on completion of programme requirements, approved results, and clearance of outstanding obligations as directed by AAD.
faqs.escalation: Contact your department and AAD Graduation Desk for eligibility verification.

faqs.question: What should I do if my name is missing from the graduation list?
faqs.answer: Report immediately to your department and AAD with supporting records so your case can be reviewed before ceremony deadlines.
faqs.escalation: Escalate to department examinations officer and AAD Graduation Unit.

faqs.question: How can I request a transcript or academic record?
faqs.answer: Apply through the official UG transcript/records process under AAD, provide identity and payment proof, then track processing timelines communicated by the office.
faqs.escalation: Follow up with AAD Records Office if processing exceeds stated timelines.

faqs.question: How do I correct an error in my name or biodata?
faqs.answer: Submit a formal correction request to AAD with valid identification and supporting legal/official documents for verification.
faqs.escalation: Escalate to AAD Records and your college registry if unresolved.

faqs.question: I cannot register courses on MIS/portal. What should I do?
faqs.answer: Check registration dates, cleared fees, and portal availability. If still blocked, contact your college/departmental registration support and UG ICT helpdesk.
faqs.escalation: Open UG ICT ticket with screenshot, date/time, and error message (without password).

faqs.question: I made payment but my application status is not updated.
faqs.answer: Payment confirmations may take some time. Keep proof of payment and recheck later; if unresolved, contact Admissions with transaction reference.
faqs.escalation: Escalate to Admissions finance/helpdesk with masked proof of payment.

faqs.question: I forgot my portal password.
faqs.answer: Use the official password reset workflow on the UG portal. Do not share password, OTP, or security codes with anyone.
faqs.escalation: If reset fails, contact UG ICT helpdesk via official channels.
